title: CREDAI is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: CREDAI is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!
